description: Notary Administration — manages notary public commissions, notary journal audits, RON provider registrations, and notary complaint investigations

hard_stops.label: Notary Bond Not Filed
hard_stops.logic: Notary public bond has not been filed with the county recorder — commission cannot be issued without bond

hard_stops.label: Background Check Disqualification
hard_stops.logic: Notary applicant has a disqualifying conviction per state notary statutes — commission application denied

hard_stops.label: RON Provider Not State-Approved
hard_stops.logic: Remote online notarization platform is not on the state-approved provider list — RON sessions on this platform are not valid

soft_flags.label: Commission Expiring Soon
soft_flags.logic: Notary commission expires within 90 days — send renewal reminder
